meta.title: Better-For-You Foods: It's Just Good Business
meta.description: Hudson Institute would like to invite you to join us for the release of a new report examining efforts by the food and beverage industry to sell better-for-you products and what impact those efforts have had on major consumer packaged goods companies' bottom lines. This report was produced by the Obesity Solutions Initiative of the Hudson Institute, with funding from the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation.Among the topics to be discussed:    Can selling better-for-you foods be better for corporate b
